channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ryanair cautions potential jet fuel supply issues in Europe due to Middle East conflict
item.description: Ryanair CEO Michael O'Leary has warned that jet fuel supplies in Europe could face disruptions in early May if the ongoing conflict in the Middle East continues. The warning comes after oil prices sur...

item.title: Philippine Lotto Winning Numbers for April 1, 2026
item.description: ABS-CBN News has published the official lotto results for April 1, 2026, providing the latest winning numbers from the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO). The article informs readers about t...

item.title: Anna Magari driving people-first growth at Serengeti Breweries
item.description: Dar es Salaam – Anna Magari, Senior Human Resources Business Partner at Serengeti Breweries Limited, has been transforming how the company approaches performance by putting people first. With over ten...

item.title: Punjab Announces Four-Day School Week Amid Global Fuel Crisis
item.description: The Punjab government has announced that all public and private schools across the province will now stay closed every Friday until further notice. The decision, shared by Punjab Education Minister Ra...

item.title: Motorist and Traffic Police Clash on Jogoo Road Amid Crowds
item.description: A tense scene erupted along Jogoo Road in Nairobi when a motorist got into a heated argument with traffic police officers. According to a video circulating online, the man was visibly upset, shouting ...

item.title: BBC confirms awareness of 2017 police inquiry into Scott Mills before his 2026 dismissal
item.description: The BBC has confirmed it was aware of a police investigation involving Radio 2 presenter Scott Mills as far back as 2017, though the probe concluded in 2019 without any charges. Mills, aged 53, was di...

item.title: Police respond to teenage gatherings causing disturbances in London and Birmingham over Easter
item.description: During the Easter holiday period, London and Birmingham have seen large groups of teenagers converge in town centres, causing widespread disorder. Social media has been identified as a key factor in o...

item.title: Fire Outbreak At Lagos Airport Terminal Forces Evacuation Of Passengers And Staff
item.description: Heavy wahala happened on Wednesday for Murtala Muhammed International Airport (MMIA) when one fire burst out for the temporary terminal. According to wetin eyewitnesses yarn, thick smoke suddenly fill...

item.title: Albanese urges calm as Australia faces fuel price challenges
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese addressed the nation amid concerns over rising fuel prices caused by global instability, particularly related to the Middle East conflict involving Donald Trump’s errat...

item.title: Joburg’s Easter Theatre Highlights Include Wonka, Shrek and Neil Diamond Tribute
item.description: With school holidays underway in Johannesburg, families have a range of theatre options to keep kids entertained while also enjoying some adult-friendly performances. 'Charlie and the Chocolate Factor...

item.title: Supreme Court imposes Rs 25,000 penalty on Centre for challenging CISF officer's reinstatement
item.description: The Supreme Court on Wednesday levied a cost of Rs 25,000 on the Union Government for unnecessarily challenging the Punjab and Haryana High Court's order, which had reinstated a Central Industrial Sec...

item.title: Gemmi Schottenheimer Honors Mike Tomlin and His Family During NFL Owners Meeting
item.description: At the 2026 NFL owners meeting in Phoenix, the absence of longtime Pittsburgh Steelers head coach Mike Tomlin was deeply felt after he stepped down earlier that year, concluding a remarkable 19-season...

item.title: Pakistan Information Ministry Confirms Border Fence Remains Intact Along Pak-Afghan Border
item.description: On April 1, 2026, Pakistan’s Information Ministry categorically denied reports suggesting that the barbed wire along the Pak-Afghan border, also known as the Durand Line, was being removed. In an offi...

item.title: Antony Beevor’s new book explores Rasputin’s influence and myth in the fall of the Romanovs
item.description: Antony Beevor’s latest historical work, Rasputin and the Downfall of the Romanovs, delves into the enigmatic figure of Grigory Rasputin and his controversial impact on the Russian Imperial family. Bee...

item.title: Joseph Duggar granted bond following child molestation charges in Florida
item.description: Joseph Duggar, star of '19 Kids and Counting', was released on a US$600,000 bond after facing charges of lewd and lascivious molestation involving a child under 12 in Florida. Duggar, 31, was arrested...

item.title: Dezi Freeman fatally shot after months on the run: Investigation continues
item.description: Dezi Freeman, a self-described 'sovereign citizen', was fatally shot by Victoria Police on Monday following a seven-month manhunt, one of the largest in the state's history. Freeman had been wanted in...

item.title: Music Industry Experts Discuss How AI Might Influence Music Production and Creativity
item.description: In a recent discussion, industry experts have shared insights on the potential effects of artificial intelligence (AI) on the Philippine music scene. While AI technologies are becoming increasingly so...

item.title: NYSC Member Abba Musa Freed After Months in Captivity by Bandits
item.description: Abba Musa, wey be National Youth Service Corps (NYSC) member, don finally regain him freedom afta wey bandits hold am captive for months. E release happen on Wednesday afta plenty negotiation and pres...

item.title: Switzerland Considers Cancelling US Patriot Missile System Purchase Amid Delays
item.description: The Swiss government is seriously considering cancelling its deal to buy the US Patriot air-defence system due to ongoing delays in delivery. Defence Minister Martin Pfister confirmed that cancellatio...

item.title: Winnipeg Jets mount impressive turnaround to sit one point out of NHL playoff spot
item.description: The Winnipeg Jets have staged a remarkable recovery in the NHL regular season following the Olympic break. Prior to the pause, the team found itself struggling, sitting seven games below .500 and faci...
